channel.title: I am trying to host my build folder on my Hosting But getting Resources Error
channel.description:
I made my **"production build"** using this command: `npx frontity build` It creates a build folder on my machine and then I uploaded it to my hosting server, after that I logged in to ssh using putty and run the following command: `npx frontity serve`
But on running this via ssh terminal I am getting this error: ![image|690x242](upload://gOZQA3pXIc20YEfpSDmvlX4Vy7E.png) Thanks,

item.title: I am trying to host my build folder on my Hosting But getting Resources Error
item.dc:creator: hammad
item.source: I am trying to host my build folder on my Hosting But getting Resources Error

item.title: I am trying to host my build folder on my Hosting But getting Resources Error
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @hammad

Great news, glad to hear that the problem is now fixed. What have you been working on? Can you post a link to your site? We’d love to see what you’ve been building with Frontity.

Read full topic
item.source: I am trying to host my build folder on my Hosting But getting Resources Error

item.title: I am trying to host my build folder on my Hosting But getting Resources Error
item.dc:creator: hammad
item.description:
Yes i talked to them its fixed now.

Read full topic
item.source: I am trying to host my build folder on my Hosting But getting Resources Error

item.title: I am trying to host my build folder on my Hosting But getting Resources Error
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @hammad

The errors seem to indicate that the system is running out of memory. Are you running this on shared hosting? You may need to ask your host to increase the memory allowance.

Hope this helps. Let us know how you get on.

Read full topic
item.source: I am trying to host my build folder on my Hosting But getting Resources Error

item.title: I am trying to host my build folder on my Hosting But getting Resources Error
item.dc:creator: hammad
item.description:
I made my “production build” using this command:
npx frontity build
It creates a build folder on my machine and then I uploaded it to my hosting server, after that I logged in to ssh using putty and run the following command:
npx frontity serve

But on running this via ssh terminal I am getting this error:


Thanks,

Read full topic
item.source: I am trying to host my build folder on my Hosting But getting Resources Error
